schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi
schemes.description: Income support of ₹6,000 per year to all landholding farmer families across the country in three equal installments.
schemes.description_hi: देश भर के सभी भूमिधारक किसान परिवारों को तीन समान किस्तों में प्रति वर्ष ₹6,000 की आय सहायता।
schemes.benefits: ₹6,000 per year in 3 installments of ₹2,000 each, directly transferred to bank account
schemes.application_process:
1. Visit pmkisan.gov.in
2. Click 'New Farmer Registration'
3. Enter Aadhaar number
4. Fill in personal and land details
5. Submit and note registration number

schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana
schemes.name_hi: आयुष्मान भारत प्रधान मंत्री जन आरोग्य योजना
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
schemes.description: Provides a health cover of ₹5 lakhs per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization to over 12 crore poor and vulnerable families.
schemes.description_hi: 12 करोड़ से अधिक गरीब और कमजोर परिवारों को द्वितीयक और तृतीयक देखभाल अस्पताल में भर्ती के लिए प्रति परिवार प्रति वर्ष ₹5 लाख का स्वास्थ्य कवर प्रदान करता है।
schemes.benefits: Health insurance cover of ₹5,000,000 per family per year for medical treatment in empanelled hospitals.
schemes.application_process:
1. Visit the Ayushman Mitra at empanelled hospitals or CSCs.
2. Verify identity using Aadhaar.
3. Get the Ayushman card printed and issued.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
schemes.description: Provides clean cooking fuel to poor households, especially women, to reduce health hazards associated with traditional cooking fuels.
schemes.description_hi: पारंपरिक खाना पकाने के ईंधन से जुड़े स्वास्थ्य खतरों को कम करने के लिए गरीब घरों, विशेषकर महिलाओं को स्वच्छ खाना पकाने का ईंधन प्रदान करता है।
schemes.benefits: Free LPG connection with financial support of ₹1600 per connection.
schemes.application_process:
1. Fill out the application form available at LPG distributors.
2. Submit the form with documents to the nearest distributor.
3. Upon verification, the connection will be issued.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin
schemes.description: Aims to provide a pucca house with basic amenities to all houseless households and households living in kutcha and dilapidated house in rural areas.
schemes.description_hi: ग्रामीण क्षेत्रों में सभी बेघर परिवारों और कच्चे और जीर्ण-शीर्ण घरों में रहने वाले परिवारों को बुनियादी सुविधाओं के साथ पक्का घर उपलब्ध कराने का लक्ष्य है।
schemes.benefits: Financial assistance of ₹1.20 lakh in plains and ₹1.30 lakh in hilly states for house construction.
schemes.application_process:
1. Beneficiaries are identified using SECC 2011 data.
2. Gram Sabha validates the list.
3. Identified beneficiaries can approach the Gram Panchayat.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana
schemes.description: Provides loans up to ₹10 lakh to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises.
schemes.description_hi: गैर-कॉर्पोरेट, गैर-कृषि लघु / सूक्ष्म उद्यमों को ₹10 लाख तक का ऋण प्रदान करता है।
schemes.benefits: Loans classified as Shishu (up to ₹50K), Kishore (₹50K-₹5L), and Tarun (₹5L-₹10L) with no collateral.
schemes.application_process:
1. Prepare a business plan.
2. Apply online through the Udyamimitra portal or visit a local bank/NBFC.
3. Submit required documents and application form.
